messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a python-pptx script generating a 12-slide creative presentation for Potential Clients about our upcoming Brand Awareness Campaign. Incorporate vibrant gradients and image placeholders throughout. Save the output as "Brand_Campaign.pptx". All content must be written in Spanish, utilizing a 16:9 Widescreen slide format. Do not use any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)

PALETTE = {
    "deep_purple": "#4A0E8F",
    "magenta":     "#FF2D9B",
    "coral":       "#FF6B6B",
    "gold":        "#FFC107",
    "teal":        "#00BCD4",
    "white":       "#FFFFFF",
    "dark_navy":   "#1A1A2E",
    "light_gray":  "#F5F5F5",
    "medium_gray": "#CCCCCC",
}

FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADING = "Arial"


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex="#FFFFFF", alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING if bold else FONT_BODY
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color_hex="#1A1A2E", border_color_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color_hex)
    if border_color_hex:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color_hex)
        line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(13)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["white"])
        run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, font_size=28, color_hex="#FFC107"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.35),
        footer_text, font_size=10, color_hex="#CCCCCC", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, label="Imagen"):
    path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "assets", label.replace(" ", "_").lower() + ".jpg")
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2A2A4E")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["magenta"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(3)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(
            left + Inches(0.15), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4)
        )
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"📷 {label}"
        run.font.size = Pt(16)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["white"])
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_decorative_circle(slide, left, top, size, color_hex):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def safe_set_title(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(
            slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
            text, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex="#FFFFFF"
        )


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def create_slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["deep_purple"])

    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(-1), Inches(-1), Inches(4), PALETTE["magenta"])
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(12.5), Inches(6), Inches(3), PALETTE["teal"])
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(9), Inches(-0.5), Inches(2), PALETTE["gold"])

    safe_set_title(slide, "Campaña de Conciencia de Marca")

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.8),
        "Presentación para Clientes Potenciales", font_size=26, bold=False, color_hex="#FFC107"
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.5),
        "Estrategia integral para posicionar su marca en el mercado", font_size=18, color_hex="#CCCCCC"
    )

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.4),
                 "© 2025 — Todos los derechos reservados", font_size=12, color_hex="#999999")


def create_slide_02_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Visión General de la Campaña")

    safe_set_title(slide, "¿Qué es una Campaña de Conciencia de Marca?")

    add_card(
        slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.6),
        "Definición",
        "Una campaña de conciencia de marca busca aumentar el reconocimiento y la familiaridad del público con su marca, creando una conexión emocional duradera.",
        bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E"
    )

    add_card(
        slide, Inches(7.1), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.6),
        "Importancia",
        "El 80% de las decisiones de compra se basan en el reconocimiento de marca. Una estrategia sólida genera confianza y preferencia.",
        bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E"
    )

    add_card(
        slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.5),
        "Nuestro Enfoque",
        "Combinamos investigación de mercado, creatividad estratégica y ejecución multicanal para maximizar el impacto de su marca en cada punto de contacto con el consumidor.",
        bg_color_hex="#3A1A6E"
    )

    add_footer(slide, 2, 12)


def create_slide_03_audience(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Análisis de Audiencia")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Público Objetivo")

    segments = [
        ("Millennials", "Edad: 28-43 años\nIntereses: Tecnología y estilo de vida", "#FF6B6B"),
        ("Generación Z", "Edad: 18-27 años\nIntereses: Redes sociales y tendencias", "#00BCD4"),
        ("Profesionales", "Edad: 35-55 años\nIntereses: Negocios y desarrollo", "#FFC107"),
        ("Familias", "Edad: 30-50 años\nIntereses: Hogar y bienestar", "#FF2D9B"),
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4)),
        (Inches(6.7), Inches(1.4)),
        (Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3)),
        (Inches(6.7), Inches(4.3)),
    ]

    for i, (title, body, accent) in enumerate(segments):
        x, y = positions[i]
        add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(5.2), Inches(2.5), title, body, bg_color_hex="#1A1A3E")
        add_decorative_circle(slide, x + Inches(4.6), y + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.5), accent)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 12)


def create_slide_04_objectives(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Objetivos Estratégicos")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Objetivos Principales de la Campaña")

    objectives = [
        ("Aumentar el Reconocimiento", "Incrementar en un 60% el reconocimiento de marca entre el público objetivo durante los primeros 6 meses."),
        ("Generar Engagement", "Alcanzar una tasa de interacción del 5% en redes sociales y plataformas digitales."),
        ("Posicionar la Marca", "Establecer a la marca como líder en su categoría dentro del mercado meta."),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(objectives):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 4.1)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.3), Inches(3.7), Inches(2.6), title, body, bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    # Decorative line
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.5), Inches(11.7), Pt(3))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["magenta"])
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.8), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.0),
                 "Cada objetivo está respaldado por datos de mercado y métricas verificables que garantizan resultados medibles.",
                 font_size=16, color_hex="#CCCCCC")

    add_footer(slide, 4, 12)


def create_slide_05_channels(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Canales de Difusión")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Canales Estratégicos")

    channels = [
        ("Redes Sociales", "Instagram, Facebook,\nTikTok, LinkedIn"),
        ("Influencers", "Colaboraciones con\ncreadores clave"),
        ("Relaciones Públicas", "Medios tradicionales\ny digitales"),
        ("Eventos", "Activaciones presenciales\ny experiencias"),
        ("Publicidad Digital", "Google Ads,\nProgramática"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(channels):
        x = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.56)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.3), Inches(2.8), title, body, bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    # Decorative circles row
    for i in range(5):
        add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(0.7 + i * 2.56), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.4), PALETTE["gold"])

    add_footer(slide, 5, 12)


def create_slide_06_content_strategy(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Estrategia de Contenido")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Plan de Contenido Creativo")

    # Central image placeholder
    add_image_or_placeholder(
        slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(4.3), Inches(2.8),
        label="Imagen Principal"
    )

    content_types = [
        ("Videos", "Contenido audiovisual\npara YouTube y Reels"),
        ("Infografías", "Datos visuales\ncompartibles"),
        ("Blog Posts", "Artículos SEO\ny educativos"),
        ("Social Media", "Publicaciones diarias\ny stories"),
    ]

    positions = [
        (Inches(0.8), Inches(4.5)),
        (Inches(3.7), Inches(4.5)),
        (Inches(6.6), Inches(4.5)),
        (Inches(9.5), Inches(4.5)),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(content_types):
        add_card(slide, positions[i][0], positions[i][1], Inches(2.5), Inches(2.3), title, body, bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    add_footer(slide, 6, 12)


def create_slide_07_budget(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Distribución del Presupuesto")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Asignación de Recursos")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Redes Sociales", "Influencers", "Publicidad Digital", "Eventos", "Producción"]
    chart_data.add_series('Distribución', (30, 25, 20, 15, 10))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(6.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    legend = chart.legend
    legend.include_in_layout = False
    legend.font.size = Pt(12)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(14)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"

    # Summary text on left side
    summary_text = (
        "El presupuesto está distribuido estratégicamente para maximizar el alcance y la efectividad de cada canal.\n\n"
        "• Redes Sociales: 30% — Mayor inversión en contenido orgánico y pagado\n"
        "• Influencers: 25% — Colaboraciones con creadores verificados\n"
        "• Publicidad Digital: 20% — Campañas segmentadas por audiencia\n"
        "• Eventos: 15% — Experiencias presenciales memorables\n"
        "• Producción: 10% — Calidad visual y audiovisual premium"
    )

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.4), Inches(5.2), Inches(5.0), summary_text, font_size=16, color_hex="#CCCCCC")

    add_footer(slide, 7, 12)


def create_slide_08_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Cronograma")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Fases de Implementación")

    milestones = [
        ("Fase 1", "Investigación\ny Análisis"),
        ("Fase 2", "Estrategia\nCreativa"),
        ("Fase 3", "Producción\nde Contenido"),
        ("Fase 4", "Lanzamiento\nCampaña"),
        ("Fase 5", "Optimización\nActiva"),
        ("Fase 6", "Reporte y\nResultados"),
    ]

    for i, (phase, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = Inches(0.4 + i * 2.13)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.9), Inches(2.0), phase, desc, bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    # Timeline line
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.7), Inches(11.5), Pt(4))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["magenta"])
    shape.line.fill.background()

    # Timeline dots
    for i in range(6):
        add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(1.35 + i * 2.13), Inches(3.55), Inches(0.4), PALETTE["gold"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.5),
                 "El cronograma completo abarca 6 meses de implementación con revisiones mensuales y ajustes en tiempo real para maximizar el ROI.",
                 font_size=16, color_hex="#CCCCCC")

    add_footer(slide, 8, 12)


def create_slide_09_kpis(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Métricas y Resultados")
    safe_set_title(slide, "KPIs y Métricas Clave")

    kpis = [
        ("Alcance", "+2.5M\npersonas alcanzadas"),
        ("Engagement", "5.8%\ntasa de interacción"),
        ("Impresiones", "12M\ndel total visualizado"),
        ("Conversiones", "+340%\naumento en leads"),
    ]

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(kpis):
        x = Inches(0.8 + i * 3.1)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.75), Inches(2.6), title, body, bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    # Decorative line
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.7), Pt(3))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["teal"])
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(11.7), Inches(2.3),
                 "Cada KPI se monitorea en tiempo real mediante dashboards personalizados. Los reportes semanales permiten ajustar la estrategia para optimizar continuamente el rendimiento de la campaña.",
                 font_size=16, color_hex="#CCCCCC")

    add_footer(slide, 9, 12)


def create_slide_10_competitive(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Ventaja Competitiva")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Posicionamiento Competitivo")

    # Left column — Our Approach
    add_card(
        slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.6),
        "Nuestro Enfoque",
        "• Estrategia basada en datos\n• Contenido personalizado\n• Medición continua\n• Equipo dedicado 24/7",
        bg_color_hex="#1A3E2A"
    )

    # Right column — Competitors
    add_card(
        slide, Inches(6.7), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.6),
        "Competencia Típica",
        "• Campañas genéricas\n• Sin segmentación real\n• Reportes mensuales\n• Recursos limitados",
        bg_color_hex="#3E1A1A"
    )

    # Bottom comparison row
    add_card(
        slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.6),
        "ROI Promedio",
        "+340% retorno de inversión\nen los primeros 6 meses",
        bg_color_hex="#1A2E4E"
    )

    add_card(
        slide, Inches(6.7), Inches(4.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.6),
        "ROI Competencia",
        "+80-120% retorno promedio\nen el mismo período",
        bg_color_hex="#2E1A3E"
    )

    add_footer(slide, 10, 12)


def create_slide_11_casestudy(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["dark_navy"])

    add_section_label(slide, "Casos de Éxito")
    safe_set_title(slide, "Resultados Comprobados")

    # Case Study 1 — Left
    add_image_or_placeholder(
        slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.6),
        label="Caso Estudio 1"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(2.7),
             "Marca de Moda Premium",
             "+280% reconocimiento de marca\n+150% ventas online\nAlcance: 3.2M personas",
             bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    # Case Study 2 — Right
    add_image_or_placeholder(
        slide, Inches(6.7), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.6),
        label="Caso Estudio 2"
    )
    add_card(slide, Inches(6.7), Inches(4.2), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.7),
             "Tecnología B2B",
             "+190% leads cualificados\n+95% engagement en LinkedIn\nAlcance: 1.8M profesionales",
             bg_color_hex="#2A2A4E")

    add_footer(slide, 11, 12)


def create_slide_12_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["deep_purple"])

    # Decorative circles
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(-0.5), Inches(7), Inches(3), PALETTE["magenta"])
    add_decorative_circle(slide, Inches(12), Inches(-0.5), Inches(2.5), PALETTE["gold"])

    safe_set_title(slide, "¿Listo para Impulsar su Marca?")

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.7),
        "Comencemos a construir una campaña que transforme su presencia de marca", font_size=24, color_hex="#FFC107"
    )

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.5),
                 "Contáctenos para una consulta personalizada sin compromiso", font_size=16, color_hex="#CCCCCC")

    # Contact cards in three columns
    contact_items = [
        ("📧 Email", "contacto@brandcampaign.com"),
        ("📞 Teléfono", "+34 900 123 456"),
        ("🌐 Sitio Web", "www.brandcampaign.com"),
    ]

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(contact_items):
        x = Inches(1.5 + i * 3.8)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(4.7), Inches(3.2), Inches(1.6), label, value, bg_color_hex="#3A1A6E")

    # CTA Button shape
    btn = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(5.0), Inches(6.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(0.7))
    btn.fill.solid()
    btn.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    btn.line.fill.background()
    tf = btn.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Agendar Reunión"
    run.font.size = Pt(18)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_navy"])
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide, 12, 12)


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    create_slide_01_title(prs)
    create_slide_02_overview(prs)
    create_slide_03_audience(prs)
    create_slide_04_objectives(prs)
    create_slide_05_channels(prs)
    create_slide_06_content_strategy(prs)
    create_slide_07_budget(prs)
    create_slide_08_timeline(prs)
    create_slide_09_kpis(prs)
    create_slide_10_competitive(prs)
    create_slide_11_casestudy(prs)
    create_slide_12_contact(prs)

    prs.save("Brand_Campaign.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
